title: IoT Layer: WebSocket, Redis Streams, TimescaleDB hypertable
description:
Реализовать IoT-пиплайн:
1. backend/app/db/models/telemetry.py — TimescaleDB hypertable
   - колонки: device_id UUID, ts TIMESTAMPTZ, data JSONB
   - Alembic migration: create_hypertable + retention_policy
2. backend/app/api/v1/iot/ — POST /data, GET /history/{id}, GET /devices
3. WebSocket /api/v1/iot/ws/{device_id} — JWT auth, ConnectionManager
4. Celery consumer: XREAD iot:{device_id} → batch insert TimescaleDB
5. Dashboard: SQL с time_bucket (не raw SELECT *)
